suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax the TDD wording for proof-only or validation-gap features so workers may strengthen assertions first and accept an immediate passing run when no runtime defect exists.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun review for `primary-generation-fix-streaming-reasoning-and-multimodal-proof` found the worker correctly invoked `test-driven-development`, but the handoff still had to mark `followedProcedure=false` only because the stronger terminal assertions passed immediately without requiring a runtime edit. The current `sdk-surface-worker` skill text still requires workers to 'add failing tests first' with no proof-only exception.
